use_cases: Navigating through paginated content using a scrollable wheel interface
Browsing product catalogs or image galleries with smooth transitions
Selecting date ranges or time periods in scheduling applications
Scrolling through menu items or category filters in e-commerce platforms
Navigating between pages of search results or filtered content
ai_summary: A wheel-based pagination component that allows users to navigate through content by scrolling or clicking through a circular wheel interface. Built with Radix UI and Radix Primitives for accessibility, featuring smooth animations and customizable button variants for consistent theming across applications.
